_note: Proposal content extracted by Claude from the consultants' attached proposal documents. Keyed by consultant name (as shown in the Semi-Final sheet). AED figures are as quoted (excl. tax); INR is indicative at ~1 AED = INR 23.

H2R Design.firm: H2R Interior Design LLC — Dubai / London
H2R Design.disciplines: Interior Design + FF&E consultancy ONLY (common/FOH areas & units). Architecture, MEP, structure and construction/shop drawings are NOT included — the appointed contractor prepares construction drawings.
H2R Design.understanding: ~10,379 sqm: two office floors (4,891 sqm each) + enclosed terrace 597 sqm, in the Homeland Group luxury mall business tower, Amritsar. Benchmark: Nasab by KOA, Al Barari. Optional food hall / F&B for coworking users (subject to finalisation).
H2R Design.deliverables: Stage 1 — Concept (8 wks): master planning + interim presentation (plans, spatial flow, inspiration), then final concept (GA plan, flooring, shopfront elevation + signage, digital sample board, 10 CGIs, FF&E selection). Stage 2 — Development (10 wks): schematic (final layout, 4 CGIs, RCP with MEP provisions, electrical, lighting layout & schedule, wall/floor/ceiling finishes, sections, facade treatment, physical sample board), then detail design & FF&E (schedules, final sample board, timeline). Stage 3 — Post-design (TBC): construction administration (shop-drawing review, submittal review, RFI responses).
H2R Design.renderings: 10 CGIs (concept) + 4 (schematic). Proposal intro also states 'up to 5 renderings'.
H2R Design.designFee: AED 910,000, excl. tax (Stage 1 Concept 450,000 + Stage 2 Development 450,000 + Stage 3 Post-design 10,000). Approx. INR 2.09 Cr.
H2R Design.supervision: Minimal — Phase 5 Construction Administration only (AED 10,000, within the total). Full supervision available at monthly rates (Partner AED 101,600; Project Director 92,000; etc.).
H2R Design.payment: Per stage: 70% advance + 30% on completion. Invoices due within 14 days.
H2R Design.revisions: 2 rounds of alterations per stage; AED 5,000 per additional round; AED 2,000/day for added services.
H2R Design.exclusions: Architecture, MEP, structure; full construction/shop drawings (by contractor); taxes; permissions/approvals/certifications; 15% handling fee on third-party procurement; out-of-town travel (reimbursable).
H2R Design.termination: 30 days' written notice; client liable for 10% of remaining-stage fees on early termination. Liability capped at fees paid to H2R. IP/copyright passes to client on payment.

Tzed Architect.firm: T.ZED Architects FZ LLC — Dubai (DDA registered)
Tzed Architect.disciplines: FULL multidisciplinary package — Architecture, Interior Architecture, MEP, Structure, Architect of Record (AoR), Fire & Life Safety (FLS), and site coordination/supervision.
Tzed Architect.understanding: Co-working space over 3 floors: 18th floor 3,460 m2, 19th floor 3,460 m2, terrace floor 3,612 m2 (~10,532 m2), Homeland Global Park, North India.
Tzed Architect.deliverables: Stage A-1 — Concept (3 wks): architectural + interior + MEP concept (brief, site analysis, bubble/zoning, sketch sections/elevations, preliminary plans, core material palette, 3D sketch-up model). Stage A-2 — Developed/Schematic + approvals (6 wks): GA plans, elevations, roof plan, sections, core details, material schedules, RCP & lighting, floor finishes, FF&E schedule + labelled plan, 5 renders + 3 montages, cost plan, MEP/structure design. Stage A-3 — Detailed/Technical (8 wks): 1:50/1:20 production drawings, detailed schedules & specs, interior elevations, component details, FF&E specs for POs, statutory approval docs. Stage B-1 — Construction/site (4–5 months): 2 site visits/wk (Arch/MEP/Structure), ID 5 days/wk during finishing, weekly progress meetings + minutes, RFI/MAF review, QA/QC, testing & commissioning, snag list, practical completion & handover.
Tzed Architect.renderings: 10 rendered 3D views included; additional views AED 6,500 each.
Tzed Architect.designFee: AED 2,250,000, excl. VAT (Stage A design, all disciplines). Approx. INR 5.18 Cr.
Tzed Architect.supervision: Extensive — Stage B: AED 45,000 per month (approx. INR 10.4 L/month) for ~4–5 months; includes 2 weekly site visits (capped 3 hrs) + full-time off-site coordination.
Tzed Architect.payment: 20% on signing (450,000) · 30% after A-1 (675,000) · 30% after A-2 (675,000) · 20% after A-3 (450,000). Stage B billed monthly.
Tzed Architect.revisions: 5 design revisions included, then charged hourly (Director Architect AED 1,000/hr; Site Architect 650; MEP/Structural engineer 500; CAD 300).
Tzed Architect.exclusions: Authority fees & permits (client); construction/shop drawings (contractor); travel outside UAE; soil testing/topographic survey (client); specialist facade/curtain-wall engineering; special security systems.
Tzed Architect.termination: 14 days' written notice; paid for services performed to termination date. Project deemed abandoned after 60 days' suspension. Client to provide affection plan, authority guidelines, signed agreement + advance, and appointment letter before start.
